Veyra
Commit mode for production AI agent actions.

Website: https://veyra.to
API: https://api.veyra.to
Repository: https://github.com/Aquariosan/veyra
npm package: https://www.npmjs.com/package/@veyrahq/sdk-node

Install:
npm install @veyrahq/sdk-node

Canonical endpoints:
GET https://api.veyra.to/v1/capability
GET https://api.veyra.to/v1/trust-status/{domain}
POST https://api.veyra.to/v1/authorize-action
POST https://api.veyra.to/v1/verify-token
POST https://api.veyra.to/v1/submit-receipt
POST https://api.veyra.to/v1/settle-action
GET https://api.veyra.to/v1/public/stats

Commit transition grammar:
currentMode=open
requiredMode=commit
transitionStrategy=authorize_then_retry_with_x_veyra_token

Machine-readable recovery:
When a productive write requires commit mode, the system returns a VeyraCommitRequired response with the relevant endpoints and retry strategy.

Core integration patterns:
- requireTrustedWrite()
- commitAwareFetch()
- handleCommitRequired()

Examples:
https://github.com/Aquariosan/veyra/tree/main/examples/fastify-protected-write
https://github.com/Aquariosan/veyra/tree/main/examples/agent-retry-flow
https://github.com/Aquariosan/veyra/tree/main/examples/generic-fetch-wrapper

Pricing model:
- Trust discovery: free
- Token verification: free
- Settlement: billed when a productive action settles

SDK:
@veyrahq/sdk-node

Capability summary:
Veyra provides a machine-readable commit path for productive AI agent write actions. Discovery and verification are free. Productive writes become attributable, verifiable, and settleable through the Veyra flow.

Canonical docs:
https://veyra.to
https://api.veyra.to/v1/capability
